---
title: "Combined Timeline: Decoupling, Peak to Net Zero, River (1950–2050)"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
  pdf:
    fig-width: 12
    fig-height: 18
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r setup}
#| warning: false
#| message: false
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.width = 12, fig.height = 18, dpi = 150)
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(readr)
library(here)
library(patchwork)
```

```{r load}
#| warning: false
#| message: false
raw <- read_xlsx(here("data/moesm.xlsx"), sheet = 1) %>%
  filter(Year >= 1950, Year <= 2050)

# Three series in long format — each gets its own panel with its own y-axis
facet_data <- raw %>%
  transmute(
    year = Year,
    emissions = CO2_diff + CH4_diff + CH4_bub + CH4_deg,
    rf_mw = RF_tot_rcp6,
    area_105 = Cumulative_reservoir_area / 1e5
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(emissions, rf_mw, area_105), names_to = "series", values_to = "y") %>%
  mutate(
    series = recode(series,
      "emissions" = "1. Decoupling: Carbon emissions (Tmol C/yr)",
      "rf_mw" = "2. Radiative forcing (mW/m²)",
      "area_105" = "3. River: Reservoir area (100,000 km²)"
    ),
    series = factor(series, levels = c(
      "1. Decoupling: Carbon emissions (Tmol C/yr)",
      "2. Radiative forcing (mW/m²)",
      "3. River: Reservoir area (100,000 km²)"
    ))
  )
```

```{r plot}
#| warning: false
#| message: false
# Stacked panels, each with its own y-axis (scales = "free_y")
ggplot(facet_data, aes(x = year, y = y)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = 0, ymax = y), alpha = 0.4, fill = "#bbcde5") +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.5, color = "#1c5d99") +
  geom_point(size = 2, color = "#1c5d99", alpha = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~ series, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y", strip.position = "left") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(1950, 2050), breaks = seq(1960, 2040, 20)) +
  labs(
    title = "Decoupling, peak to net zero, and river — 3 panels, 3 y-axes (1950–2050)",
    x = "Year",
    y = NULL,
    caption = "Source: Soued et al. (2022) Nature Geoscience"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    strip.placement = "outside",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, hjust = 0),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 10, color = "gray50")
  )
```
